Video.summary: Son of a mobster, Detective Sergeant Rick Hunter and Sergeant Dee Dee McCall team up to catch a serial killer.
Video.title: Hunter

Video.summary: McCall's ex-partner has gone bad. In an attempt to save him from prison, McCall and Hunter try to stop him.
Video.title: Hard Contract

Video.summary: After the Commissioner's wife is murdered, Hunter and McCall piece together the clues to find the true killer.
Video.title: The Hot Grounder

Video.summary: A meek pick-pocket is accused of beating a woman. Hunter and McCall, unconvinced, must find the true culprit.
Video.title: A Long Way From L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter uses a mobster's girlfriend as bait after she overhears an argument between him and his father.
Video.title: Legacy

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall help a girl who claims her uncle has died and all of his pigeons have been stolen.
Video.title: Flight On A Dead Pigeon

Video.summary: A drug dealer is killed by a thief who stole Hunter's "backup" gun. McCall must clear Hunter's name.
Video.title: Pen Pals

Video.summary: A bounty hunter tracking two bank robbers crosses paths with Hunter and McCall.
Video.title: Dead Or Alive

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must protect a sleazy criminal who has been given immunity for fingering a top criminal.
Video.title: High Bleacher Man

Video.summary: A motorcycle cop is killed by a man on a "nighthawk." The killer motivated by a dispute over a game at a bar.
Video.title: The Shooter

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must track down a killer who has been shooting parolees.
Video.title: The Garbage Man

Video.summary: A mentally disturbed surveillance expert attempts to "help" Hunter by killing a suspect and a witness.
Video.title: The Avenging Angel

Video.summary: A cocaine dealer being escorted by an obnoxious detective escapes. Hunter and the detective pursue her.
Video.title: The Snow Queen, Part 1

Video.summary: The pursuit of the cocaine dealer continues and the plot thickens as Hunter and McCall's cases collide.
Video.title: The Snow Queen, Part 2

Video.summary: The Beach Boy arrives in LA and begins to kill drug dealers. Hunter and McCall must figure out his next move.
Video.title: The Beach Boy

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a convicted murderer who is free and has vowed to kill the jurors who convicted him.
Video.title: Guilty

Video.summary: A contract killer makes hits throughout the city in order to ingratiate himself with a criminal kingpin.
Video.title: The Last Kill

Video.summary: Someone has been setting fires all over the city to empty warehouse, and Hunter and McCall are on the case.
Video.title: Fire Man

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go after a sniper who is killing blondes that remind him of his wife who jilted him.
Video.title: Sniper

Video.summary: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.
Video.title: Case X

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest
Video.title: Night Of The Dragons

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.
Video.title: The Biggest Man In Town

Video.summary: A millionaire is nearly killed, his wife the prime suspect, until she's murdered.
Video.title: Rich Girl

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.
Video.title: Killer In The Halloween Mask

Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
